packages.description: SochDB query engine (sync-first execution and vector query planning)

packages.name: sochdb
packages.description: SochDB - LLM-optimized database with native vector search

packages.name: sochdb-mcp
packages.description: Minimal MCP server for SochDB - AI-native database

packages.name: sochdb-wasm
packages.description: SochDB vector index for WebAssembly (browser JavaScript)

packages.name: sochdb-vector
packages.description: Streaming elimination vector search engine for SochDB - CPU-first ANN with RDF + BPS
